tools.name: ast_grep
tools.description: Structural search/rewrite. Search-only runs directly; rewrite mode requires explicit UI approval.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"pattern":{"type":"string","description":"ast-grep pattern, e.g. 'fmt.Println($X)'"},"language":{"type":"string","description":"Language hint (go, python, typescript, rust, …)"},"path":{"type":"string","description":"Relative to workdir"},"rewrite":{"type":"string","description":"Optional: replacement pattern for in-place rewrite"}},"required":["pattern"]}
